Quality Education.reason: Focus on language and literacy development aligns with Target 4.6 ('achieve literacy and numeracy').

The course provides quality tertiary education (Target 4.3) and promotes appreciation of cultural diversity by studying various writing systems to "增進國際視野" (enhance international perspective) (Target 4.7).
evidence: 擴及各個民族使用的文字增進國際視野
世界各國古代文字的發現與破譯

Reduced Inequalities.reason: The course promotes understanding of different cultures by studying the writing of "各個民族" (various ethnic groups), which supports the principle of social inclusion (Target 10.2).
evidence: 擴及各個民族使用的文字增進國際視野

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: The course focuses on deciphering ancient scripts like "商代甲骨文" and "蘇美爾文字", directly contributing to the safeguarding of the world's cultural heritage (Target 11.4).
evidence: 世界各國古代文字的發現與破譯
商代甲骨文、蘇美爾文字、古埃及文字、瑪雅文字
更貼近古代人當時的歷史生活

Climate Action.reason: The course studies "甲骨文中的自然現象與災異觀" (natural phenomena and disasters in oracle bone script), offering a historical perspective on natural disasters, tangentially related to Target 13.3.
evidence: 甲骨文中的自然現象與災異觀

Life on Land.reason: The course studies "漢字中的古代生物" (ancient creatures in Chinese characters), contributing to a historical and cultural understanding of biodiversity, related to the spirit of Target 15.5.
evidence: 認識與動物有關的甲骨文字

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The syllabus requires students to "維護智慧財產權" (Respect Copyright), a minor link to promoting the rule of law under Target 16.3.
evidence: 維護智慧財產權，務必使用正版書籍

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course fosters an "增進國際視野" (international perspective) by studying global writing systems, which supports the knowledge sharing and global mindset essential for partnerships (Target 17.6).
evidence: 世界各國古代文字的發現與破譯
